content:
As we've heard the clear rate of hard mode has been quite low in the playerbase, here's a couple of ideas to possibly encourage players to interact with hard mode a bit more.

1. Allow players to do hard mode off rip, giving them the normal stage rewards as well after completion.

This kills 2 birds with 1 stone. The start of the game was too easy, and now is even easier with the limited unit buffs, and the new units boasting quite a bit of utility.

This may be a double edged sword though. Even if players could go back to doing normal mode when it gets hard (basically having a bunch of the tedious repetitive stages already done). Once they hit a wall of hard mode being too hard, they might take it as a sign that the game is pay to win, or make other assumptions... The decision in the end is yours.

2. The less intrusive suggestion. An event that gives rewards for hard stage completion. And I mean any 5-10 uncompleted hard stages. Not a specific chapter. Any. If they've already completed all the hard stages they'd get the rewards immediately as to not need to clear again.

This is also quite paradoxical, since getting to like... Ch9 hard and not being able to clear Ant for the rewards may be considered unfair...

3. Have the hard mode archive give a few limited pulls as well.

If anyone has any other suggestions or arguments for and against write em down bellow.
thread_title: ✅「Answered」A couple of ways to encourage players to clear hard mode.

content: Hard mode right now is more of an optional completion thing — we're not forcing everyone to fully clear it.<:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>
thread_title: ✅「Answered」A couple of ways to encourage players to clear hard mode.

content: ✅「Answered」A couple of ways to encourage players to clear hard mode.
thread_title: ✅「Answered」A couple of ways to encourage players to clear hard mode.
